prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约1207名→2696名→3528名→5543名→5869名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4662名；2025年基准位次约5869名，较2024年小幅后移约326名，后移速度有所放缓；本省物理类计划2021年13人、2022年15人、2023年19人、2024年21人、2025年21人；2026年计划19人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招约9.5%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；上海交通大学软科主榜第4名（2026年），医学院为其核心组成部分，临床医学A+、口腔医学A+等学科全国顶尖，整体层次极高；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生私吞竞赛奖金、撤稿量较高等），可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度方面，上海交通大学总排名第42位（较热），医学院未单独统计；未见投档断档记录；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、基础医学A-、护理学A-、生物学A+等，与招生专业（临床医学、预防医学等）高度对应，顶尖学科实力对高分考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），口腔医学72.31（推荐），医学类专业整体保持高热；本省2026年考生总数约393700人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计391238人略有增加，估算物理类约251000人，竞争略加剧；上海交通大学医学院校本部位于上海，属跨省招生；该校在湖北省招生占比约4.2%（2023年19人/全国452人），近年占比稳定，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（竞争略缓解）、本省考生总数略增（竞争略加剧）、声誉偏负面（轻微降温）以及临床医学高热（支撑报考）等多重因素，在2025年基准5869名基础上，经有限修正后预测最低位次约5564名，区间5064–6064名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（本博连读；卓越医学创新人才计划）
- 临床医学（本博连读，口腔方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（卓越医学创新人才计划；五年制）
- 预防医学（含双学士学位项目；五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（卫生事业管理方向，含双学士学位项目；五年制）
- 预防医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5064–6064名内，建议以二档为主力报考方向（五年制临床医学和预防医学），一档本博连读专业可作为冲刺目标（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档预防医学作为保底选择。上海交通大学医学院学科实力顶尖，临床医学A+和口腔医学A+全国领先，报考热度持续高位，建议考生结合自身位次合理规划志愿梯度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 1207 → 2696 → 3528 → 5543 → 5869, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4662 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5869, a slight backward shift of about 326 positions compared to 2024, with a slowing pace; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 13 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 21 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 19, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 9.5%, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with its School of Medicine as a core component, featuring top-tier disciplines such as Clinical Medicine A+ and Stomatology A+, overall extremely high level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (students embezzling competition bonuses, relatively high retraction rates), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; in terms of Douyin popularity, Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 42nd overall (relatively popular), with the School of Medicine not separately counted; no records of admission cutoff breaks; Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, Basic Medicine A-, Nursing A-, Biology A+, etc., highly corresponding to enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, etc.), with top-tier discipline strength strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine had a popularity index of 70.19 in 2024 (recommended), Stomatology 72.31 (recommended), with medical majors overall maintaining high heat; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from the 2025 total of 391,238 for Physics + History categories, with an estimated Physics Category of about 251,000, slightly intensifying competition; the School of Medicine is headquartered in Shanghai, involving cross-provincial enrollment; the school's enrollment proportion in Hubei Province is about 4.2% (19 in 2023 out of 452 nationwide), with a stable proportion in recent years and no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight reduction in the 2026 plan (slightly easing competition), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province (slightly intensifying competition), a somewhat negative reputation (slight cooling), and the high heat of Clinical Medicine (supporting applications), based on the 2025 baseline of 5869, after limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5564, with a range of 5064–6064.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuum; Outstanding Medical Innovation Talent Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuum, Stomatology Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Medical Innovation Talent Program; Five-Year System)
- Preventive Medicine (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program; Five-Year System).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Preventive Medicine (Health Management Direction, Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program; Five-Year System)
- Preventive Medicine (Five-Year System).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5064–6064, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main application direction (five-year Clinical Medicine and Preventive Medicine), with Tier 1 Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuum programs as sprint targets (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 Preventive Medicine as a safety choice. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine has top-tier disciplinary strength, with Clinical Medicine A+ and Stomatology A+ leading nationally, and application enthusiasm remains high. Candidates are advised to plan their volunteer gradient reasonably based on their own rankings.
